title: Martin Chvila
intro: I'm a <founder>founder</founder>, <engineer>software engineer</engineer>, and <ai>AI integrator & evangelist</ai>. I build products, write code, and help companies harness the power of artificial intelligence to transform their workflows and unlock new possibilities.

founder.title: Founder
founder.text: I build products and businesses from the ground up. From initial concept to market, I bring ideas to life through technology, design, and relentless execution. I believe in building things that matter and shipping fast.

engineer.title: Software Engineer
engineer.text: I've been writing software professionally for over a decade. Full-stack, pragmatic, and product-minded. I care about code that works, systems that scale, and developer experience that doesn't get in the way.

ai.title: AI Integrator & Evangelist
ai.text: I help companies integrate AI into their products and workflows. Not hype, but real, practical applications that deliver results. From LLMs to computer vision, I bridge the gap between what AI can do and what businesses need.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: The best way to reach me is by email or on social media.
